globalNews.title: Iran says it has halted attacks on Israel after first exchange of fire since truce
globalNews.summary: Iran launched about 30 missiles at Israel following a strike in Lebanon, while Israel carried out two waves of air strikes in Iran.

globalNews.title: Iran releases footage of missiles launched at Israel
globalNews.summary: Iran said its attacks were "the beginning of a full week of continuous strikes."

globalNews.title: At least 32 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
globalNews.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

globalNews.title: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
globalNews.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.

globalNews.title: 'A World Cup for them not us': Fans' anger at US travel bans and visa restrictions
globalNews.summary: Fans across the world say US travel bans and visa regulations make them feel excluded from the World Cup.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.

cryptoNews.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
cryptoNews.summary: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
cryptoNews.summary: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

aiNews.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
aiNews.summary: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

aiNews.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
aiNews.summary: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.
